name: Ayu
text: In Ayub Cave, Sarangani, archaeologists discovered the Maitum Anthropomorphic Burial Jars.

name: Ayu
text: These jars date from 500 BC to 500 AD and show human-like faces carved into pottery.

name: Ayu
text: According to Dizon (1996), they reflect advanced burial traditions and spiritual beliefs of early Mindanao communities.

name: Ayu
text: They are considered national treasures of the Philippines.
